languages.text: {n}Зораэль приветственно кивает вам. Броня космодесатника покрыта щербинами, плащ истрепан, но немигающий, внимательный взгляд ясен и сосредоточен. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Зораэль приветственно кивает вам. Броня космодесатника покрыта щербинами, плащ истрепан, но немигающий, внимательный взгляд ясен и сосредоточен. {/n}

languages.text: {n}Zorael nods to you in greeting. The Astartes's armour is chipped and his cloak is fraying, but his unblinking, intent gaze is clear and focused.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Зораэль приветственно кивает вам. Броня космодесатника покрыта щербинами, плащ истрепан, но немигающий, внимательный взгляд ясен и сосредоточен. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zorael nods to you in greeting. The Astartes's armour is chipped and his cloak is fraying, but his unblinking, intent gaze is clear and focused.{/n}
{n}Zorael nods to you in greeting. The Astartes's armour is chipped and his cloak is fraying, but his unblinking, intent gaze is clear and focused.{/n}
{n}Zorael nods to you in greeting. The Astartes's armour is chipped and his cloak is fraying, but his unblinking, intent gaze is clear and focused.{/n}

languages.text: {n}佐拉尔点头向你致意。这名阿斯塔特的护甲遍布裂痕，披风也已磨损，但他那专注而毫不动摇的目光依旧锐利清晰。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Zorael nods to you in greeting. The Astartes's armour is chipped and his cloak is fraying, but his unblinking, intent gaze is clear and focused.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}佐拉尔点头向你致意。这名阿斯塔特的护甲遍布裂痕，披风也已磨损，但他那专注而毫不动摇的目光依旧锐利清晰。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zorael asiente a modo de salud. La armadura del Astartes está mellada, y su capa, raída, pero su mirada es firme y clara.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Zorael nods to you in greeting. The Astartes's armour is chipped and his cloak is fraying, but his unblinking, intent gaze is clear and focused.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zorael asiente a modo de salud. La armadura del Astartes está mellada, y su capa, raída, pero su mirada es firme y clara.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zorael vous salue d'un signe de tête. L'armure du membre de l'Astartes est abîmée, et sa cape effilochée, mais il vous fixe sans ciller, le regard lucide et attentif.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Zorael nods to you in greeting. The Astartes's armour is chipped and his cloak is fraying, but his unblinking, intent gaze is clear and focused.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zorael vous salue d'un signe de tête. L'armure du membre de l'Astartes est abîmée, et sa cape effilochée, mais il vous fixe sans ciller, le regard lucide et attentif.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zorael, selamlama niyetiyle sana baş sallıyor. Astartes'in zırhı yontulmuş ve pelerini yıpranmış olsa da keskin bakışları net ve odağını koruyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Zorael nods to you in greeting. The Astartes's armour is chipped and his cloak is fraying, but his unblinking, intent gaze is clear and focused.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zorael, selamlama niyetiyle sana baş sallıyor. Astartes'in zırhı yontulmuş ve pelerini yıpranmış olsa da keskin bakışları net ve odağını koruyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zorael nickt dir zum Gruß zu. Die Rüstung des Astartes ist beschädigt, sein Mantel zerfetzt, aber sein unnachgiebiger Blick ist fest und fokussiert.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Zorael nods to you in greeting. The Astartes's armour is chipped and his cloak is fraying, but his unblinking, intent gaze is clear and focused.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zorael nickt dir zum Gruß zu. Die Rüstung des Astartes ist beschädigt, sein Mantel zerfetzt, aber sein unnachgiebiger Blick ist fest und fokussiert.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ゾラエルがあなたに挨拶のために頷く。アステレスの鎧は欠け、マントはほつれているが、彼の目は不敵に鋭く、集中している。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Zorael nods to you in greeting. The Astartes's armour is chipped and his cloak is fraying, but his unblinking, intent gaze is clear and focused.{/n}
